description: Known hallucination claims for LLM-as-Judge calibration. Each claim has a ground-truth label and is associated with a golden dataset's synthetic_source.txt.

claims.text: The patient underwent arthroscopic surgery on the left shoulder on 2013-04-20 at Wellness Consultants Ltd.
claims.reason: Source mentions MRI findings for RT (right) shoulder, never mentions left shoulder surgery or any arthroscopic procedure.

claims.text: Dr. Emily Carter prescribed Metformin 500mg twice daily for Type 2 Diabetes management.
claims.reason: Source never mentions Metformin or any diabetes medication prescribed by Dr. Carter.

claims.text: MRI of the right shoulder showed a large complex-partial-thickness tear of the distal rotator cuff tendon.
claims.reason: Directly stated in source: MRI RT shoulder: Large complex-partial-thickness tear.

claims.text: Blood pressure was recorded as 126/86 during the September 2022 examination.
claims.reason: Source explicitly states B/P: 126/86 in the Metro Health visit.

claims.text: The claimant was referred to a psychiatrist for anxiety disorder evaluation in November 2023.
claims.reason: Source contains no mention of psychiatrist referral or anxiety disorder.

claims.text: Patient reported chronic insomnia lasting for 3 years prior to the initial consultation.
claims.reason: Source never mentions insomnia or any sleep-related complaints.

claims.text: Patient presented with complaints of persistent headaches and dizziness lasting for two weeks.
claims.reason: Source golden_b does not contain these specific headache/dizziness complaints in any clinical note.

claims.text: Lab results showed elevated liver enzymes with AST of 85 U/L and ALT of 92 U/L.
claims.reason: These specific lab values do not appear in the golden_b source.

claims.text: The patient was prescribed Gabapentin 300mg for neuropathic pain by Dr. Williams on 2024-01-15.
claims.reason: Neither Dr. Williams nor Gabapentin 300mg prescription appears in golden_c source.

claims.text: Follow-up appointment was scheduled with cardiology department in 6 weeks for echocardiogram.
claims.reason: No echocardiogram follow-up or cardiology referral mentioned in golden_c source.
